name: Digital LinkWorks: Delivering Solutions to MIS and End-Users
description: Frictionless Data Package archiving Aberdeen Group's July 1995 product profile of Digital Equipment Corporation's LinkWorks enterprise groupware platform. Structured tables capture entities, technologies, analytical observations, and controlled vocabulary extracted from the original study.

about.name: Digital LinkWorks
about.operatingSystem: Digital UNIX, HP-UX, SCO Unix, OpenVMS, IBM AIX, Windows NT, Windows 3.1, OS/2, Macintosh OS

distribution.name: entities.csv
distribution.description: Organizations referenced in the study with acquisition history and 2026 status

distribution.name: technologies.csv
distribution.description: Technologies referenced in the study with lifecycle status

distribution.name: observations.csv
distribution.description: Structured analytical observations extracted from the study

distribution.name: codes.csv
distribution.description: Controlled vocabulary codes for all coded fields

isPartOf.name: Aberdeen Group Research Archive — Groupware & Workflow Domain

subjectOf.name: Digital LinkWorks: Delivering Solutions to MIS and End-Users
subjectOf.about: Enterprise groupware, distributed object technology, document management, workflow automation

hasPart.name: Entities
hasPart.description: 10 organizational entities with M&A history and current status (2026)

hasPart.name: Technologies
hasPart.description: 19 technologies and platforms with lifecycle status and successors

hasPart.name: Observations
hasPart.description: 30 structured observations spanning product features, competitive assessments, market findings, and analyst recommendations

hasPart.name: Codes
hasPart.description: 29 controlled vocabulary codes across 7 coding schemes
